hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/IDENTITY.md" ]; then echo 'Forge is loaded — PM mode active. Run /forge:status to see your release plan, or /forge:harvest to start the next cycle.'; elif [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/THESIS.md" ] || [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/THESIS-minimal.md" ] || [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/THESIS-full.md" ]; then echo 'Forge is loaded — Founder mode active. Run /forge:status for hypothesis trajectory, or /forge:interrogate to keep validating.'; else echo 'Forge is loaded. Run /forge:try to see the Devil'\''s Advocate in action, or /forge:init when you'\''re ready to set up your project.'; fi
